'''TK-420''' was the designation<ref name="JKTCG" /> of a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] serving in an inspection crew during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. TK-420 was tasked with examining supply shipments to the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]]. The [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] wore the standard suit of [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]], and wielded an [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
TK-420 was created by a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
